findings.location: s1 — configuration table, 必須 column
findings.description: The knowledge file adds a '必須' column and marks both statement rows with '○', implying each is individually required. The source says '排他利用。いずれか必須' (exclusive use; one or the other is required), meaning at most one can be used and at least one must be used — not that both are independently required.
findings.source_evidence: 備考列: 「排他利用。いずれか必須」

findings.location: s1 — configuration table, デフォルト値 column
findings.description: The knowledge file adds a 'デフォルト値' column to the configuration table. The source table has no such column and contains no information about default values.
findings.source_evidence: Source table columns are: 設定項目, プロパティ名, データ型, 備考 — no default values column exists
